_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
procedure_name: Dorsal and lumbar spine fixation - Anterior
min_doctor_qualification: Diploma in Orthopedics with 10 years of experience
clinical_indications: Thoracic and lumbosacral spine to provide stability
To restore anatomic alignment in the treatment of fractures, degenerative disease, and infection and tumors
To correct congenital deformities such as scoliosis

preauth.label: Clinical notes with history, signs, symptoms, evaluation findings, indication for procedure, planned line of management and advice for admission
X-ray films labelled with patient ID, date and side (Left/ Right) -affected part

claim.label: Post-procedure X-ray films labelled with patient ID, date and side (Left/Right) -affected part

ppd_preauth.q: Clinical notes with history, signs, symptoms, evaluation findings, indication for procedure, planned line of management and advice for admission
X-ray films labelled with patient ID, date and side (Left/ Right) -affected part

cpd_claim.q: Did the post procedure X-ray films labelled with patient ID, date and side (Left/ Right) confirms the surgery/ implant?
Are the detailed procedure / Operative Notes available?
Is the Discharge summary with follow-up advise at the time of discharge?
Does the Post Procedure X Ray/MRI, show the fixation with the implant?

common_queries: Post-procedure X-ray/MRI does not clearly show the fixation with the implant.
Clinical notes lack complete history, signs, symptoms, evaluation, indication, or planned management for pre-authorization.
Pre-operative X-ray films are missing or not properly labelled with patient ID, date, or affected side.
Post-operative X-ray films are missing or do not confirm the surgery/implant.
Invoice and barcode for the implant are missing or incomplete.
Detailed procedure/operative notes are not available or are incomplete.
Discharge summary lacks essential follow-up advice at the time of discharge.

clinical_key_pointers: Almost 50% of Spinal injuries of the thoracolumbar region are unstable and can result in significant disability deformity and neurological deficit.
surgical_options: Anterior Approach: About 80% of the axial load of an intact spine is supported by the anterior column.
